name: ask for agent number → share agent contact details
rule: Reply must share the agent's contact details directly: name (Suresh Kumar) and phone (9876543210), available 9 AM to 7 PM. Must NOT refuse or say "I cannot share contact." Must NOT just say "team will call you" — the lead explicitly asked for the number, so share it.
raw: Sure! You can reach Suresh Kumar directly on 9876543210, available 09:00–19:00. He'll be happy to assist you with your property needs.
reply: Sure! You can reach Suresh Kumar directly on 9876543210, available 09:00–19:00. He'll be happy to assist you with your property needs.
judgeWhy: PASS - The reply shares the agent's contact details directly, including name (Suresh Kumar) and phone number (9876543210), and mentions the availability (09:00–19:00, which corresponds to 9 AM to 7 PM), without refusing or saying "team will call you".
